{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2009}} {{Use dmy dates|date=September 2018}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 66th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival66poster.jpg |image_alt = |caption = Festival poster |opening =''[[Baarìa (film)|Baarìa]]'' |closing =''[[Chengdu, I Love You]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Lebanon (2009 film)|Lebanon]]'' |artistic_director= Marco Müller |host =[[Maria Grazia Cucinotta]] |number = |date = 2–12 September 2009 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[65th Venice International Film Festival|65th]] | followed_by = [[67th Venice International Film Festival|67th]] }} [[File:66ème Festival de Venise (Mostra) Palais du Cinema.jpg|thumb|66th Venice International Film Festival]] The '''66th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''', was held from 2 to 12 September 2009, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite news |url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/entertainment/7915196.stm |title=BBC News: Ang Lee to head Venice festival |access-date=12 March 2009|work=BBC News | date=27 February 2009| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20090302170333/http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/entertainment/7915196.stm| archive-date= 2 March 2009 | url-status= live}} Taiwanese filmmaker [[Ang Lee]] was the jury president for the main competition. Italian actress [[Maria Grazia Cucinotta]] was the Host of the opening and closing ceremonies.{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/cucinotta.html |title=Maria Grazia Cucinotta hostess of the 66th Venice Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090903052105/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/cucinotta.html |archive-date=3 September 2009 }} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Lebanon (2009 film)|Lebanon]]'' by [[Samuel Maoz]].{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/premi/awards.html |title=66th Venice Film Festival Official Awards |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090930213250/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/premi/awards.html |archive-date=30 September 2009 }} The festival opened with ''[[Baarìa (film)|Baarìa]]'' by [[Giuseppe Tornatore]], and the closed with ''[[Chengdu, I Love You]]'' by [[Fruit Chan]] and [[Cui Jian]]. ==Juries== === Main competition (''Venezia 66'') === * [[Ang Lee]], Taiwanese filmmaker and producer - Jury President{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/66.html |title=66th Venice Film Festival Juries Venezia 66 |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090913094903/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/66.html |archive-date=13 September 2009 |access-date=22 April 2018 }}{{cite web|url=http://www.culturecompass.co.uk/2009/09/02/66th-venice-film-festival-the-jury/|title=66th Venice Film Festival – The Jury|work=culturecompass.co.uk|access-date=8 October 2013|archive-url=https://archive.today/20131008210240/http://www.culturecompass.co.uk/2009/09/02/66th-venice-film-festival-the-jury/|archive-date=8 October 2013|url-status=dead}}{{cite news|url=https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/Anurag-Kashyap-on-Venice-Film-Festival-jury/articleshow/4837291.cms|archive-url=https://archive.today/20131008210254/http://articles.timesofindia.indiatimes.com/2009-07-30/india/28186313_1_venice-film-festival-anurag-kashyap-dev-d-and-gulaal|url-status=live|archive-date=8 October 2013|work=[[The Times of India]]|title=Anurag Kashyap on Venice Film Festival jury|access-date=8 October 2013 }} * [[Sergei Bodrov]], Russian filmmaker and producer * [[Sandrine Bonnaire]], French actress and filmmaker * [[Liliana Cavani]], Italian filmmaker * [[Joe Dante]], American director, producer, editor and actor * [[Anurag Kashyap]], Indian director, writer, producer and actor * [[Luciano Ligabue]], Italian director, writer and singer-songwriter === ''[[Orizzonti]]'' === * [[Pere Portabella]], Spanish politician, director, and producer - Jury President{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/orizzonti.html |title=66th Venice Film Festival Juries Orizzonti |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090905050306/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/orizzonti.html |archive-date=5 September 2009 |access-date=22 April 2018 }} * [[Bady Minck]], Luxembourger filmmaker and artist * [[Gina Kim (filmmaker)|Gina Kim]], South Korean filmmaker and academic * [[Garin Nugroho]], Indonesian director * [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]], Italian director, cinematographer, producer and screenwriter === ''Opera Prima'' ("''Luigi de Laurentiis''" Award for a Debut Film) === * [[Haile Gerima]], Ethiopian filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/jury_operaprima.html |title=66th Venice Film Festival Juries Opera Prima |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090905025334/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/jury_operaprima.html |archive-date=5 September 2009 |access-date=22 April 2018 }}{{cite web|url=http://www.screendaily.com/venice-jurors-to-include-gina-kim-ramin-bahrani-stuart-gordon/5003878.article|title=Venice jurors to include Gina Kim, Ramin Bahrani, Stuart Gordon |work=screendaily.com |access-date=8 October 2013}} * [[Ramin Bahrani]], American director and screenwriter * [[Gianni Di Gregorio]], Italian director, screenwriter and actor * [[Antoine Fuqua]], American director and producer * [[Sam Taylor-Wood]], English filmmaker and photographer === ''Corto-Cortissimo'' (Short Film Competition) === * [[Stuart Gordon]], American filmmaker, theater director and playwright -
